field.label: Enabled
field.help: Enable custom startup and shutdown beep sounds

field.label: Startup Beep
field.help: Select the beep sound to play when the system starts up

field.label: Shutdown Beep
field.help: Select the beep sound to play when the system shuts down

field.label: Custom Startup Beep File
field.help: Path to a custom speaker notation file for startup beep (only used when "Custom file" is selected above). Place files in /usr/local/etc/beep-selector/beeps/

field.label: Custom Shutdown Beep File
field.help: Path to a custom speaker notation file for shutdown beep (only used when "Custom file" is selected above). Place files in /usr/local/etc/beep-selector/beeps/
